raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The artifact couples modest numeric deltas (AUROC +0.025, ρ +0.07, balanced-accuracy +0.04) with the strong claim 'dominates the competition by a wide margin'; logical consistency between premises, reported numbers, and that conclusion must be checked.","R1.3":"Specific AUROC, Spearman ρ, and balanced-accuracy figures are asserted for three benchmarks; verifying that the stated numbers actually support the superiority claim — and that comparators are fairly characterised — is central to any substantive review."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I evaluate whether the scientific claims and quantitative evidence are logically sound and internally consistent (R1.2/R1.3 load-bearing), or is the primary ask a review of prose quality and clarity of expression (R1.6 load-bearing)?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact couples modest numeric deltas (AUROC +0.025, ρ +0.07, balanced-accuracy +0.04) with the strong claim 'dominates the competition by a wide margin'; logical consistency between premises, reported numbers, and that conclusion must be checked.
rationale.R1.3: Specific AUROC, Spearman ρ, and balanced-accuracy figures are asserted for three benchmarks; verifying that the stated numbers actually support the superiority claim — and that comparators are fairly characterised — is central to any substantive review.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I evaluate whether the scientific claims and quantitative evidence are logically sound and internally consistent (R1.2/R1.3 load-bearing), or is the primary ask a review of prose quality and clarity of expression (R1.6 load-bearing)?
